source_id: # raw_path:     Path relative to vault root (e.g.
#               untracked = raw source awaiting full ingest (raw/untracked/)
#               bridged   = pre-processed source normalized via bridge pass (raw/bridge/)
# origin:       manual | mindos | obsidian | notion | roam | logseq | chatgpt | claude | colleague | self | unknown
#               Describes where the file came from before entering this system
# compiled_into: Comma-separated list of wiki pages created/updated from this source
# content_hash: SHA256 hash of source file at time of ingest (for change/staleness detection)
# ingested_date: YYYY-MM-DD when processed (blank if not yet processed)

raw_path: URL      → raw/untracked/ → full ingest  → status: ingested
Notion   → raw/bridge/    → bridge pass  → status: bridged

notes: Imported from MindOS PC sync; confidence medium
